title: Scottish Raspberry Mess
description: A traditional Scottish dessert made with raspberries, whipped cream, and crunchy biscuits.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whip the whipped cream until soft peaks form.
2. Add the granulated sugar and whip until stiff peaks form.
3. Crush the Eton Mess biscuits into fine crumbs.
4. Fold the crushed biscuits into the whipped cream mixture.
6. Spoon the mixture into individual serving dishes or glasses.
7. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
